1_clean_state.description: State was already clean from previous tests

2_create_strategy_a_with_multiple_workfl.description: Created Strategy A with 2 workflows and 1 tree
2_create_strategy_a_with_multiple_workfl.expected: Strategy A has 2 workflows and 1 tree, all entities linked correctly
2_create_strategy_a_with_multiple_workfl.actual: Strategy A created with 2 workflows (Backend, Frontend) and 1 tree (Architecture Decisions). All entities linked correctly. Strategy metadata shows correct IDs

3_create_strategy_b_with_different_workf.description: Created Strategy B with 1 workflow and 1 tree
3_create_strategy_b_with_different_workf.expected: Strategy B has 1 workflow and 1 tree, independent from Strategy A
3_create_strategy_b_with_different_workf.actual: Strategy B created with 1 workflow (Unit Tests) and 1 tree (Test Strategy). Strategy B is independent from Strategy A with different IDs

4_test_cross_strategy_isolation.expected: Tasks cannot be shared between workflows in different strategies
4_test_cross_strategy_isolation.actual: Skipped - requires attempting cross-strategy task sharing operations

5_test_strategy_deduplication.expected: Strategies with similar names handled correctly
5_test_strategy_deduplication.actual: Skipped - requires creating duplicate strategy name

6_test_removing_entities_from_strategy.description: Removed Workflow A2 from Strategy A
6_test_removing_entities_from_strategy.expected: Removed entities unlinked but not deleted
6_test_removing_entities_from_strategy.actual: FAIL: remove_workflow_from_strategy deleted the workflow instead of unlinking. Workflow 'development-workflow-frontend' no longer exists in the system. Expected behavior: workflow should remain in system but be unlinked from strategy

7_test_complex_strategy_structure.actual: Skipped - requires creating strategy with 3 workflows and 2 trees

9_verify_persistence.description: Waited 2 seconds for debounced save, verified thoughtflow-state.json
9_verify_persistence.actual: Multiple strategies persisted with correct IDs. Each strategy has correct workflow and tree lists. Strategy metadata preserved

key_findings.multiple_workflows_per_strategy: WORKING - Strategy can organize multiple workflows
key_findings.multiple_trees_per_strategy: WORKING - Strategy can organize multiple trees
key_findings.strategy_isolation: PARTIALLY_TESTED - Strategies created independently, cross-contamination not fully tested
key_findings.remove_workflow_from_strategy: FAILED - remove_workflow_from_strategy deletes workflow instead of unlinking
key_findings.persistence: WORKING - Strategy organization state persists correctly

critical_issue.issue: remove_workflow_from_strategy deletes entity instead of unlinking
critical_issue.expected_behavior: Workflow should remain in system but be unlinked from strategy
critical_issue.actual_behavior: Workflow is completely deleted from system
critical_issue.impact: Data loss when removing entities from strategies
critical_issue.recommendation: Fix remove_workflow_from_strategy to unlink without deleting
